title: sarothra major
intro: Sarothra major, also known as the 'Indian stinging tree', is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Sri Lanka. It contains a toxic sap that serves as a defense mechanism, which has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Sarothra major include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can aid in reducing swelling and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying the leaves and processing them into a powder or decoction, which can be used to treat various health issues.
